name: Cillian O'Faoilean
summary: Dedicated Android Engineer with 5 years of experience building scalable mobile applications. Proven track record in optimizing app performance and implementing clean architecture patterns in Kotlin-based environments.

experience.title: Android Developer
experience.description: Lead the development of a high-traffic fintech application, focusing on modularization and migrating legacy Java codebases to Kotlin.

experience.title: Junior Android Engineer
experience.description: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement UI/UX designs and integrated RESTful APIs for a suite of retail mobile products.

experience.title: Mobile Intern
experience.description: Assisted in the maintenance of internal enterprise tools and participated in unit testing cycles to ensure application stability.
